---
applyTo: '**/*.md'
---

## Mermaid Diagram Theme

All Mermaid diagrams in this repository MUST use this theme:

```
%%{init: {'theme':'base', 'themeVariables': {
  'primaryColor':'#FFB3BA',
  'primaryTextColor':'#000',
  'primaryBorderColor':'#FF8B94',
  'lineColor':'#BAE1FF',
  'secondaryColor':'#BAE1FF',
  'tertiaryColor':'#FFFFFF'
}}}%%
```
